pages.raw_text:
The present assessed valuation OF
railroad property in the state of
Washington. including both the
rolling stock and the rights-of-way,
is $21 900 a mile, while the value
of the same property according to
the report of the state railroad COM
mission is $4,000 a mile.


State Tax Commissioner Frost
says:


THE state railroad commission,
which has Investigated the whole
subject thoroughly, found that the
railroads are assessed at only about
80 per cent of the value Of their
property.


"The interstate commerce COM
mission, in a report made some
years ago, when railroad property
was of considerable less value,
found that the railroads In the state
of Washington were worth an av-
erage of $4,000. In 1908 the as
sessment of all railroad property,
whether that of steam roads or
street railways, will be made by the
state tax commission"
